MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Everett Hewlett Jr.; Clerk: NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff Tenderloin Housing, is present. Represented by Carlos Moran
Attorney, Paul Hogarth, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, William Thompson, is present.
Attorney, Jinnhua Su , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Paul Renne, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 306A, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of DEC-20-2010 is vacated.
